visible_observations: A very large bald muscular man stands in a wide braced stance, projecting an enlarged armored fist and forearm toward the viewer while keeping the other hand clenched at his side.
Dark geometric tattoos or incisions cover his scalp, face, neck, arms, and exposed skin; layered black shoulder pieces, ragged waist cloth, heavy trousers, wraps, and reinforced boots cover the rest.
The foreshortened giant fist, powerful body, grounded legs, and direct gaze make a close-range bruiser action immediately visible.
defects: The bald giant, extreme musculature, oversized fist, dark wraps, and wide stance follow a familiar heavy-brawler template.
Dense repeated tattoo, leather, rivet, swirl, and patch textures cover nearly every surface, reducing hierarchy between skin, anatomy, armor, cloth, and weapon.
The enlarged forearm mixes pale flesh-like folds, metal straps, plates, symbols, and knuckles without clearly showing whether it is anatomy, armor, machinery, or all three.
The face's exposed teeth and lifted mouth corner can read as a confident grin or friendly challenge rather than unequivocal hostility.
uncertainties: The image does not establish whether the enlarged arm is a prosthetic, mutation, gauntlet, transformation, or ordinary equipment.
The visible marks could be tattoos, scars, engraved armor-like skin, or supernatural writing; the body shows no clear reaction to them.
The bald head and facial creasing suggest mature age, but the degree of age versus species or surface patterning is unresolved.

visible_observations: Three black candidates show the same broad bald humanoid with a massive arm ending in an enlarged clenched fist, a long conical drill-like point, and a short cylindrical barrel or ram.
The poses change from planted frontal display to hunched charge and upright advance, while the oversized arm remains the dominant asymmetry.
defects: The body plan and heavy garment mass remain nearly unchanged; most exploration is confined to swapping the enlarged arm's endpoint.
The arm is so large in every candidate that it obscures torso orientation and makes the free arm secondary.
The fist, drill, and barrel imply materially different combat mechanisms without another visible feature connecting them as one stable identity.
uncertainties: The image provides no A, B, C labels or explicit selected-candidate marker.
White internal outlines reveal weapon details that would not survive as part of a pure black outer silhouette.

visible_observations: The face turns toward the viewer with direct eyes, one brow more compressed than the other, a furrowed forehead, set jaw, and one mouth corner lifted to expose teeth.
Geometric markings cover the bald scalp, cheeks, nose, jaw, and neck; the enlarged marked arm occupies the lower foreground.
defects: The asymmetrical mouth and direct gaze communicate confidence or taunting, but they can also read as a casual grin.
The facial markings are dense enough to compete with brow, cheek, and jaw contours used to read expression.
The face shows no visible pain, exhaustion, fear, or loss of control in relation to the drastically enlarged arm.
uncertainties: Unaided viewing cannot distinguish menace, amusement, contempt, pain, or competitive excitement in the exposed-teeth expression.
It is unclear whether the facial marks are voluntary decoration or a bodily consequence.

visible_observations: At native size, the bald head, broad shoulders, wide legs, heavy boots, and oversized pale fist projected across the torso remain visible.
The enlarged fist is the clearest focal shape against the dark body and background.
defects: The face, tattoos, material distinctions, knuckle construction, garment layers, and smaller clenched hand collapse at this size.
Dark cloak, torso, trousers, boots, and background merge into a broad generic heavy-body silhouette.
The surviving read is an oversized-fist bruiser with little of the specific arm construction or facial identity retained.
uncertainties: No neighboring unit icons, gameplay background, selection frame, or motion state are shown, so in-context recognition and attack direction cannot be determined.
